actions: rewrote realtimeBridge.ts off hard-coded host paths · resolves HOST via ROADMAP_HOST_REPO env (fail-hard if unset · §Fail-hard) with optional opts.hostRepo override for tests

watches HOST/.roadmap/{head.json,trail.jsonl,completed.json,heads/} via node fs.watch (parent-dir fallback when target missing) plus per-lane round-* directory watch · poll fallback at 2000ms when fs.watch unsupported
emits discriminated-union RealtimeEvent: head-changed | trail-appended | node-appended (node-advanced) | batch-rolled · debounced 100ms · each event tagged with lane id
multi-lane aware: discovers registry at HOST/.roadmap/<registry> · reads lanes[].repoPath · attaches a watcher slot per sibling .roadmap/ · merges streams into one subscriber callback
wrote realtimeBridge.test.ts (6 vitest cases): fail-hard on missing env · head-changed emit · trail-appended emit · node-advanced emit · snapshot lanes/subscribers/slots · idempotent startBridge
validator-gates passed: pnpm vitest run = 6/6 GREEN · grep -n 'fleet' realtimeBridge.ts → exit 1 (no match)
fail_hard_compliance: ROADMAP_HOST_REPO unset throws · no silent default to cwd · no 'support both' fallback path
subscribe() before startBridge() throws · enforces lifecycle order rather than auto-init
registry file missing → still produces single host lane · registry malformed JSON → throws (no try/catch swallow)

claims.jq_probe_cmd: cd viewer && pnpm vitest run src/services/realtimeBridge.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -q '6 passed' && echo ok
grep -q 'export type RealtimeEvent' viewer/src/services/realtimeBridge.ts && echo ok

next: frontier advances to viewer-port-core-readers (sibling) and downstream viewer-port-dag-component · realtimeBridge now mountable behind an SSE handler in a future viewer-sse-handler node
